description.lead: Use DuckDuckGo/Kagi !bangs to search directly on any of 10 000+ supported websites. For example,

bookmarks.start: Bangs also work as bookmarks for homepages: use
bookmarks.end: to open Reddit, Amazon, Github, and X.

description.start: Thru! redirects your query in ~0.1 second: faster than DDG, Kagi or
Thru! works locally and have no way to store your search history — check out

customization.title: Customizable.
customization.description: You can change the search engine from DuckDuckGo to Google or anything else. More features are coming.

chrome.title: Chrome, Yandex Browser, Opera, etc.
chrome.1: Go to Settings › Search engine › Manage search engines and site searches
chrome.2: Scroll to <q>Site search</q> and click <q>Add</q> button
chrome.3: Set <q>Name</q> and <q>Shortcut</q> fields to anything you want
chrome.5: Click on three dots ⋮ and select Make default

firefox.title: Firefox, Zen, etc.
firefox.1: Right click on URL in address bar of this page
firefox.3: Go to Setting › Search and choose Thru! as a default search engine

safari.title: Safari
safari.1: Safari does not support custom search engines, stay tuned for a browser extension.

default-bang.help: Use <q>!g</q> for Google, <q>!ya</q> for Yandex and <q>!b</q> for Bing.
